title: Kohima、Nagaland — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Kohima、Nagaland的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Kohima是Nagaland的一个城市，人口约120,000。The capital of Nagaland, a hill station known for its WWII battlefield, Naga tribal culture, and the annual Hornbill Festival.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
